THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURK, ALEXANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STRUCTURE PROPERTIES, INC. $1,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,765.00, PLAINTIFF IS CHARGED $350 FOR PAINT. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDRA BURK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STRUCTURE PROPERTIES, INC. REPRESENTED BY DREW SOLTIS, PROPERTY MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SUTTER ST. LLC, REPRESENTED BY GRANT LEONG, MANAGING PARTNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SUTTER ST. LLC IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF IN COURT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF RETURNS CHECK #121 IN THE AMOUNT OF $970.65 TO DEFENDANT IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERKS: W. TRUPEK/ATESH DATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
